title: Angular Reference
description: Angular components, services, directives, and modules reference.

items.name: @Component
items.description: Decorator that marks a class as an Angular component.

items.name: @Input()
items.description: Pass data from parent to child component.

items.name: @Output()
items.description: Emit events from child to parent component.

items.name: @Injectable
items.description: Marks a class as available for dependency injection.

items.name: RouterModule
